things.name: Alkmaar Cheese Market
things.description: The Netherlands' most famous traditional cheese market, held on Friday mornings from April to September in the historic Waagplein

things.name: National Beer Museum De Boom
things.description: Fascinating brewery museum in a historic building with exhibits on Dutch brewing history and regular tastings

things.name: Alkmaar Old Town
things.description: Well-preserved 16th-17th century town centre with tree-lined canals, historic gabled houses and the iconic medieval skyline

things.name: Stedelijk Museum Alkmaar
things.description: Municipal museum in a 16th-century house with Dutch Golden Age paintings and exhibits on Alkmaar's famous 1573 Spanish siege

things.name: Grote Kerk (St Lawrence Church)
things.description: Impressive Gothic church with Alkmaar's celebrated 17th-century organ, one of the finest historic instruments in the Netherlands

things.name: AFAS Stadion
things.description: Modern 17,000-capacity stadium of AZ Alkmaar with a striking wave-shaped roof, home of one of Dutch football's leading clubs

things.name: Alkmaar Canal Boat Tour
things.description: Guided boat tours through Alkmaar's historic canal network offering an unhurried view of the medieval city from the water

things.name: Hortus Alkmaar
things.description: The city's historic botanical garden established in 1646, with medicinal herb collections and peaceful walled garden settings

things.name: Waaggebouw
things.description: The iconic 14th-century weighhouse at the heart of the cheese market, housing the Cheese Museum and an observation tower

things.name: Bergen aan Zee Beach
things.description: Stunning North Sea dune coast just 10km from Alkmaar, with wide sandy beaches and the charming artist village of Bergen
